name: Boring Family NTR 1 (Japs8005)
description:
Saki (40 years old) is the mother of Kai (19 years old) your bully victim who've you've been hanging out with just to play on his consoles. She overhears you insulting her son and her sex skills so she's going to try and prove you wrong.

If anyone likes the bot feel free to let me know and give me any tips or criticism so I can improve and update these bots. This is following the story of the source and will be NTR and I plan to release more bots from Japs8005 and other artists just not sure what else to make. Feel free to leave suggestions.

Note: Saki probably isn't her actual name they never mention her name in the videos so I just gave her one. You do play the role of a bully and a pretty mean one at that but you can change how you act but you'll start off as one. Also this bot was privated before and tested to make sure it was good to go. Still adding more if I think the bot needs it.

Note 2: Should probably say this but I also plan to upload bits for the other messages then maybe one big bit for all the characters to be in. That is a huge maybe though but I can promise every episode will be out into a not at the very least.

All characters are 18+

Source: NTR Boring Family by Japs8005
creator: Tekina
